data.title: Ripple’s RLUSD Stablecoin Lands First Bank Integration via AMINA
data.description:
AMINA Bank becomes the first global bank to support Ripple’s RLUSD stablecoin, offering custody and trading services to institutional clients.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/ripples-rlusd-stablecoin-lands-first-bank-integration-via-amina/

data.title: Trader Says the Time To Be Bullish on Altcoins Is Here, Updates Outlook on Bonk and One Other Solana-Based Memecoin
data.description:
A widely followed cryptocurrency analyst and trader is suddenly turning bullish on altcoins. The analyst, pseudonymously known as Bluntz, tells his 322,200 followers on social media platform X that the Bitcoin dominance (BTC. D) metric is flashing a bearish divergence, setting the stage for alts to outperform the flagship crypto asset

data.title: SlowMist finds ‘Solana-pumpfun-bot’ on GitHub contains a coin theft trap
data.description:
SlowMist has brought to light that the widely used open-source project “Solana-pumpfun-bot” on the GitHub platform has code that steals crypto from its users’ wallets. The investigation began on July 2, 2025. A victim contacted the SlowMist security team to seek assistance in analyzing the reasons for the theft of his wallet assets. The incident […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/slowmist-solana-pumpfun-bot-on-github-theft/

data.title: UAE authorities pick up WhiteRock founder for role in $30M ZKasino exit fraud
data.description:
WhiteRock founder, Ildar Ilham, has been arrested by UAE law enforcement, according to a social media update first shared by the famous crypto sleuth ZachXBT. Ilham became a person of interest over his alleged involvement in the ZKasino exit scam, which swallowed a whopping $30 million. According to a red notice shared by ZachXBT on […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/uae-whiterock-founder-30m-zkasino-exit-fraud/

data.title: Striking similarities between current Pudgy Penguins trajectory and PEPE’s past breakout
data.description:
Pudgy Penguins (PENGU) price has surged by 70% amid ETF filing and Revolut listing. A renowned analyst has compared PENGU’s breakout to PEPE’s past rally. Strong support and rising volume signal bullish momentum for PENGU

data.title: IBIT ETF Emerges as Third Highest Revenue Fund for BlackRock
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Bloomberg's senior ETF analyst Eric Balchunas revealed that IBIT has become the third highest revenue-generating ETF under BlackRock, standing out among its 1,197 funds. The fund is only $9 billion away from claiming the top position.

This achievement is remarkable for an ETF that is only 1.5 years old, highlighting its rapid growth and success within the industry.

data.title: US Labor Market Adds 147,000 Jobs In June
data.description:
Catenaa, Thursday, July 03, 2025- US labor market continues to add more jobs despite economic uncertainty, as 147,000 nonfarm jobs were added in June, along fall in the unemployment rate. The US economy added 147,000 nonfarm payrolls in June, more than the 106,000 expected by economists. The unemployment rate unexpectedly fell to 4. 1%. Economists had […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/us-labor-market-adds-147000-jobs-in-june

data.title: Stablecoins Now Account for 74.6% of Institutional Crypto Trades
data.description:
TL;DR Stablecoins accounted for 74. 6% of institutional OTC volume in the first half of 2025, up from 46% a year earlier and 23% in 2023. USDC multiplied its trading volume by 29 after restrictions on USDT in Europe, while Cardano, Solana, and XRP captured 16. 7% of OTC activity. Finery Markets warned that the growing number. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/stablecoins-now-account-for-74-6-of-institutional-crypto-trades/

data.title: ZachXBT Says North Korean Devs Siphon $16.5M Via Fake Jobs, Up to 920 Roles Compromised
data.description:
On-chain investigator ZachXBT revealed extensive North Korean infiltration of cryptocurrency and technology companies through fake employment schemes. The investigation traces $16. 58 million in payments to DPRK IT workers while identifying multiple operational clusters across various projects. ZachXBT Reveals $16
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/07/03/zachxbt-says-north-korean-devs-siphon-16-5m-via-fake-jobs-up-to-920-roles-compromised/

data.title: Mara Holdings reaches 50K BTC treasury milestone
data.description:
Mara Holdings expanded its treasury to 50K BTC, becoming the second-largest holder after Strategy (MSTR). Mara Holdings has the option to issue stock for BTC buying, but mostly relies on a growing hashrate to produce more blocks.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/mara-holdings-reaches-50k-btc-treasury/
